title: Standing Orders
description: Run a tense western conference by memorizing gavel-and-telegraph pulse sequences and slamming the right delegate badges before the chamber breaks into chaos.

howToPlayJson.title: Standing Orders
howToPlayJson.objective: Replay each announced pulse pattern across four western delegate podiums, survive as the conference standings reshuffle, and build the highest combo before three mistakes end the session.

controls.input: Tap one of the four podium buttons
controls.outcome: Plays that delegate's short pulse in the sequence

controls.input: Press and hold a podium button
controls.outcome: Matches any held beat in the announced pattern

controls.input: Tap the glowing 'Standing Chair' podium last when it is marked
controls.outcome: Banks a bonus and locks in the round's score multiplier

steps: Listen to a short opening pulse sequence played by four western conference delegates, each with a distinct instrument hit and color.
Replay the pattern by tapping the same podiums in order; some beats are short taps and later rounds add held beats.
Every 2-3 rounds, the standings shift: one delegate becomes the 'Standing Chair' and must be played last no matter where it appeared in the
Complete rounds in a row to raise your combo multiplier, speed up the chamber tempo, and extend the sequence length.
Miss a beat, mistime a hold, or forget the current standing rule and you lose one of three gavels; lose all three and the session ends.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Score 100 points per correct beat, plus a round-clear bonus that scales with sequence length. Consecutive perfect rounds raise a combo multiplier up to x5. Ending a round with the marked Standing Chair adds a risk bonus,
tips: Learn each delegate by sound first; the audio cue is faster than reading the badge.
When the standings shift, mentally move the glowing chair to the end before you start tapping.
Use short sessions aggressively: a safe combo to x3 often beats chasing one risky perfect run.
